name: OpenAI Quick Chat
description: Sendet einen kurzen Test-Prompt an die OpenAI Responses API. Erfordert OPENAI_API_KEY.

commands.bash: curl -s https://api.openai.com/v1/responses -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer $OPENAI_API_KEY" -d '{"model":"gpt-4.1-mini","input":"Give me a one-line summary of the current directory purpose."}'
commands.cmd: powershell "$body = @{ model = 'gpt-4.1-mini'; input = 'Give me a one-line summary of the current directory purpose.' } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://api.openai.com/v1/responses' -Method Post -Headers @{Authorization='Bearer ' + $env:OPENAI_API_KEY} -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body"
commands.powershell: $body = @{ model = 'gpt-4.1-mini'; input = 'Give me a one-line summary of the current directory purpose.' } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://api.openai.com/v1/responses' -Method Post -Headers @{Authorization='Bearer ' + $env:OPENAI_API_KEY} -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body
commands.wsl: curl -s https://api.openai.com/v1/responses -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer $OPENAI_API_KEY" -d '{"model":"gpt-4.1-mini","input":"Give me a one-line summary of the current directory purpose."}'
commands.zsh: curl -s https://api.openai.com/v1/responses -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer $OPENAI_API_KEY" -d '{"model":"gpt-4.1-mini","input":"Give me a one-line summary of the current directory purpose."}'
